title: Map Making Modpack
description: A modpack to enhance map/datapack making experience
body:
Map Making Modpack is a modpack to enhance the map-making experience.

# 💡 Features

- Command blocks have a better UI with multi-lines command area and capability to switch to other chained command blocks without having to leave the UI
- Better syntax highlighting for commands
- Better suggestions for commands
- Tooltip to show the content of a container while looking at it
- Some performance improvements
- Multi-language selection, without having to reload whole resource packs
- Capability to copy NBTs
- Unit testing for Minecraft
- Performance profiling
- Minecraft building interfaces and tools
- World generation debugging
- NBT auto-completion
- Multi-scoreboard display
- Component visualizer

# 🏷️ Mods & Credit

Even if we are creators of the modpack itself, we are not the mod developers and all the credit goes to them. Big thanks to all of them for providing such wonderful mods! You can get the complete list of mods and their creators in the details of each version of this modpack.

# ❓ Issues and Suggestions

If you want to report bugs or suggest new mods to add, don't hesitate to come on the [companion GitHub repository](https://github.com/Gunivers/Map-Making-Modpack).
